2604.05116.title: Uncertainty-Guided Latent Diagnostic Trajectory Learning for Sequential Clinical Diagnosis
2604.05116.paper_summary: Clinical diagnosis requires sequential evidence acquisition under uncertainty. However, most Large Language Model (LLM) based diagnostic systems assume fully observed patient information and therefore do not explicitly model how clinical evidence should be sequentially acquired over time. Even when diagnosis is formulated as a sequential decision process, it is still challenging to learn effective diagnostic trajectories. This is because the space of possible evidence-acquisition paths is relatively large, while clinical datasets rarely provide explicit supervision information for desirable diagnostic paths. To this end, we formulate sequential diagnosis as a Latent Diagnostic Trajectory Learning (LDTL) framework based on a planning LLM agent and a diagnostic LLM agent. For the diagnostic LLM agent, diagnostic action sequences are treated as latent paths and we introduce a posterior distribution that prioritizes trajectories providing more diagnostic information. The planning LLM agent is then trained to follow this distribution, encouraging coherent diagnostic trajectories that progressively reduce uncertainty. Experiments on the MIMIC-CDM benchmark demonstrate that our proposed LDTL framework outperforms existing baselines in diagnostic accuracy under a sequential clinical diagnosis setting, while requiring fewer diagnostic tests. Furthermore, ablation studies highlight the critical role of trajectory-level posterior alignment in achieving these improvements.
2604.05116.paper_summary_zh: 臨床診斷需要在不確定性下進行連續的證據獲取。<lb/>然而，大多數基於大型語言模型 (LLM) 的診斷系統假設患者信息是完全可觀察的，因此並未明確建模臨床證據應如何隨時間順序獲取。<lb/>即使將診斷表述為一個連續的決策過程，學習有效的診斷軌跡仍然具有挑戰性。<lb/>這是因為可能的證據獲取路徑空間相對較大，而臨床數據集很少提供對理想診斷路徑的明確監督信息。<lb/>為此，我們將連續診斷公式化為一個基於規劃 LLM 代理和診斷 LLM 代理的潛在診斷軌跡學習 (LDTL) 框架。<lb/>對於診斷 LLM 代理，診斷行動序列被視為潛在路徑，我們引入一個後驗分佈，優先考慮提供更多診斷信息的軌跡。<lb/>然後，規劃 LLM 代理被訓練以遵循這一分佈，鼓勵連貫的診斷軌跡，逐步減少不確定性。<lb/>在 MIMIC-CDM 基準上的實驗表明，我們提出的 LDTL 框架在連續臨床診斷設置下的診斷準確性上超過了現有的基準，同時需要更少的診斷測試。<lb/>此外，消融研究突顯了軌跡級後驗對齊在實現這些改進中的關鍵作用。
2604.05116.author: Xuyang Shen et.al.
2604.05116.authors: Xuyang Shen, Haoran Liu, Dongjin Song, Martin Renqiang Min
